title: Senior Plant Manager at Exide Industries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Exide Industries
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!
